core_principles: Content Density: High but breathable. Use whitespace to separate groups, not borders.
Visual Hierarchy: Bold numbers, subtle labels.
Micro-Interactions: Soft hover lifts, smooth transitions.
Depth: Use shadows and layering (z-index) rather than flat borders.

layout_structure.sidebar: w-64 flex-shrink-0 h-full bg-slate-900 border-r border-slate-800 flex flex-col transition-all duration-300
layout_structure.main_content: flex-1 flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden relative
layout_structure.header: h-16 flex-shrink-0 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200 flex items-center justify-between px-6 z-10 sticky top-0

Card.className: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

variants.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
variants.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
variants.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 transition-colors
variants.danger: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 border border-red-100 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium

Badge.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ring-1 ring-inset

Table.wrapper: w-full overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm
Table.header_cell: px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider

implementation_checklist: Install missing dependencies: `yarn add framer-motion zustand @tanstack/react-query`
Configure Tailwind theme to match 'colors' section
Create a 'Layout' component that wraps the Sidebar, Header, and Page Content
Ensure all components are responsive (hidden sidebar on mobile with toggle)
Use 'recharts' for Analytics and Dashboard charts
Implement 'Sidebar' with Links to: Dashboard, Products, Orders, Messages, Clients, Promotions, Analytics, Settings
Products Page must have a Data Table with Image, Name, Price, Status, Actions
Dashboard must have Stats Cards + Sales Area Chart + Recent Orders
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid slate-50/100 or white
Use borders sparingly; use shadows for depth
All interactive elements must have a hover state
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and links
Use 'lucide-react' icons with size 18 or 20 for UI elements
Maintain a 'card-less' look for the dashboard grid where appropriate, or use very subtle white cards
